title: oxybaphus linearis var. decipiens
intro: Oxybaphus linearis var. decipiens, also known as the 'Decoy Snakeroot', is a plant species classified under the Four O'Clock family (Nyctaginaceae) and is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential in treating muscle spasms and other conditions. Oxybaphus linearis var. decipiens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
